name: Governor-elect Jim Justice
subject: It's West Virginia's Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Inaugural Committee |
body:
Justice Inaugural Committee Announces Theme
"It's West Virginia's Time"

Today, inaugural committee co-chairs Cathy Justice, Dr. Jill Justice, and Jay Justice announced the theme and logo for Governor-elect Jim Justice’s inaugural festivities: “It's West Virginia's Time.”

“It’s West Virginia’s time to really shine,” said Dr. Jill Justice, co-chair of the Inaugural Committee. “West Virginia has the talent and the opportunities to thrive; the Governor-elect will make sure we play to every single one of our strengths. No one will work harder than my dad for the people and to make our state number one.”

Jim Justice believes it’s West Virginia’s time to go on a jobs rocket ride and write the next chapter of West Virginia’s future. Governor-elect Justice asked West Virginians to elect him Governor because he recognizes that the time is ripe for West Virginia to become a premier location for innovation and job creation. As Governor, Jim Justice aims to transform West Virginia into a world leader in tourism, energy, agriculture, and other industries.

The inaugural theme emphasizes the state’s potential and Justice’s boundless faith in the ability of West Virginians to achieve greatness. As a lifelong West Virginian and a renowned business leader in his home state and at the national level, Governor-elect Justice brings to office a unique perspective on how to elevate West Virginia to new heights.

As he promised in his campaign, Governor-elect Justice will use his business expertise and roster of contacts to turbocharge West Virginia’s economy. He believes that the Mountain State must play to its strengths: four spectacular seasons, a prime location within 600 miles of two-thirds of the U.S. population, a bounty of natural resources, and its biggest blessing -- the people of West Virginia.

Governor-elect Justice will take the oath of office on January 16, 2017, at 1 p.m., on the Kanawha River side of the West Virginia State Capitol. His inaugural ball will be held at the iconic Greenbrier resort later that evening, beginning at 7:30 p.m. More information about the inaugural festivities will be released shortly.

For questions about the inauguration festivities please call 681-205-8628 or email inaugural@justiceforwv.com

-------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Justice Inaugural Committee |
-------------------------------------------------

Justice Inaugural Committee
PO Box 40027
Charleston WV 25364 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/2708789405422061568/8074816193791657984.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f0/4067b0a/22007194f/7e078958/2732278832/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161212_dnc_full&source=em_20161212_dnc_full"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f0/4067b0a/22007194f/7e078959/2732278832/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161212_dnc_full&source=em_20161212_dnc_full"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f0/4067b0a/22007194f/7e078966/2732278832/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161212_dnc_full&source=em_20161212_dnc_full") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3f0/4067b0a/22007194f/7e078967/2732278832/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161212_dnc_full&source=em_20161212_dnc_full"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

# [www.DonaldJTrump.com ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_tmw15&n=2)
---
|
---
USA THANK YOU TOUR 2016 IN WI TOMORROW!
| Dear Peter,

Join President-Elect Donald J. Trump and Vice-President-Elect Mike Pence for the USA Thank You Tour 2016 in West Allis, WI **Tomorrow****, Dec. 13th at 7:00 PM**! [Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fwest-allis-wi2%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_tmw15&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/west-allis-wi2/"). Details about the event are below:

******Tues****day, Dec. 13th** : West Allis, WI
****Wisconsin State Fair Exposition Center
8200 W. Greenfield Av
West Allis, WI 53214

Doors Open: 4:00 PM (CST)
Event Begins: 7:00 PM (CST)
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fwest-allis-wi2%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_tmw15&n=4 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/west-allis-wi2/").
_

_ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you tomorrow!

Limited-Edition USA Thank You Tour 2016 merchandise will be sold at this event. For the holidays, get your MAGA gear [here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_tmw15&n=5 "https://shop.donaldjtrump.com/"). Sincerely,

Team Trump–Pence

* * *

TEXT **TRUMP** TO **88022** TO GET EXCLUSIVE UPDATES ***By participating, you consent to receiving automated text messages from the campaign. Standard messaging rates apply.***

To donate, go here: [https://secure.donaldjtrump.com/donate/](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.donaldjtrump.com%2Fdonate%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_tmw15&n=6 "https://secure.donaldjtrump.com/donate/")
_Contributions are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: FLASH SALE: Your #ThanksObama tote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Announcing a one-day FLASH SALE on all "Thanks Obama" tote bags! Take advantage of this unbeatable deal today and get your tote in time for the holidays. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161212-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")
---
It's that time of the year, Friend --

The Obamas are preparing for their final holidays at the White House. While we're sad to see them go, there's so much progress to celebrate -- from marriage equality and healthcare reform to 15.6 million new jobs!

We've got the perfect way to honor that hard work and put you in the holiday spirit: [**A $29 FLASH SALE on all "Thanks Obama" tote bags >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161212-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

| [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161212-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")
---
Not only is today's flash sale an unbeatable deal (SAVE nearly 20% and get FREE shipping!), but it's the LAST CHANCE to get your "Thanks Obama" tote in time for the holidays!

[**So make your list, check it twice, and don 't miss this opportunity before we close orders for the year! Contribute $29 or more today to get your "Thanks Obama" tote >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161212-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

Happy Holidays,

Catherine Algeri
Director of Marketing, DSCC
P.S. Need an extra gift or want to _gently_ remind your Republican relative of the progress we achieved? [**Buy a second tote and save even more with our TWO totes for $50 deal (nearly 30% off with FREE shipping!) >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-tote-order?refcode=DPE-20161212-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.
[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20161212-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,29,50,100,150,250&amount=29")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eee5/2b07114c/404c09af/7368fbbe/614402338/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eee5/2b07114c/404c09af/7368fbb9/614402338/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eee5/2b07114c/404c09af/7368fbb8/614402338/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
